ocr_snippet: Patient's Name .... 2024062570844 SHEET PIMS No 14/5/26  ClSB : Entrance fever. 101.2°F @ 10pm (1 hr) – Ceftriaxone 1.5g BD Vitals : stable U/O (11:11 6pm) - 7.3 ml/kg/hr (from RAM) S/E : PLA : soft, not, liver palpable. A.N.B. RAH liver span 10.5 cm. Plan : 1) Continue IV Antibiotics 2) N/F 3) To send CBC + RBP on next pick.
